q: How many moving objects are on the screen? Answer with a single number.
q_alt: Count the objects in motion on screen. Reply with one number.

q: Does the bright square ever disappear or vanish from view at any point? Answer yes or no.
q_alt: Is there any moment where the square is completely gone from the screen? Answer yes or no.

q: When the square changes direction, does it do so at the edge of the screen or in the middle of the screen? Answer edge or middle.
q_alt: Where does the square turn around — at a screen edge, or out in the middle?

q: Is the square's motion smooth and continuous throughout, without any jumps or disappearances? Answer yes or no.
q_alt: Does the square travel in one unbroken path, with no gaps or sudden jumps? Answer yes or no.
